text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap turns up at my office one day, looking
confused.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I feel like my head's gone all weird. There's this
throbbing pain that won't go away...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Eating a mountain of food is my magic cure, so I
usually do that to feel better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But this time, my head just started throbbing
again!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What do you think I should eat? Maybe eating
fish heads will make this headache go away...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sardine head? Sea bream head? Or maybe the
head of a taiyaki?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This headache is really giving her some grief.
